name: @gjsify/example-dom-gamepad-snes
description: SNES controller gamepad visualizer using the standard Gamepad Web API, adapted from https://codepen.io/alvaromontoro/full/bGbpmvR

scripts.build:gjs: gjsify build src/gjs/gjs.ts --app gjs --globals dom,web --outfile dist/gjs.js
scripts.build:assets: cp -f src/browser/index.html dist/index.html && cp -f src/browser/style.css dist/style.css

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
